issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING AT 5MPH, THE IGNITION BUTTON WAS ACCIDENTALLY PUSHED IN.  WHEN THIS HAPPENED, THE ENGINE IMMEDIATELY TURNED OFF, THE VEHICLE ROLLED FOR A SECOND AND THEN THE CAR CAME TO A HALT AS IF I SLAMMED ON THE BRAKES.  THE IGNITION BUTTON IS LOCATED NEXT TO THE COMPUTER SCREE

narrative.headline: What 2015 Lincoln Mkc owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 129 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
